model.hint: Add your AI models below. The first model is the default. Drag to reorder.
model.summarizerDesc: fast model for web page summarization
model.deleteModelBody: This will permanently remove the model configuration. This action cannot be undone.

confirm.title: Unsaved changes
confirm.body: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.

mcp.hint: Configure MCP servers that the agent can connect to. Changes take effect on next agent restart.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.deleteServerBody: This will permanently remove the MCP server. This action cannot be undone.

tools.hint: Configure web search and page fetching providers for the agent.
tools.webFetchDesc: Fetch and extract web page content
tools.fetchNote: * Requires a summarizer model — configure in Model settings

sandbox.vmDesc: Local VM sandbox — runs agent code securely on your machine
sandbox.vmReady: VM is running and fully set up.
sandbox.vmNotSupported: VM backend is not available on this platform.
sandbox.chatModeDesc: Cloud sandbox via E2B — runs agent code remotely
sandbox.e2bRequired: An E2B API key is required to use Chat mode.
sandbox.chatEnabledDesc: Enable browser-based sandbox (requires E2B API key)
sandbox.biosInstructions: We cannot enable BIOS virtualization remotely, but you can finish it in 3 steps:
sandbox.biosStep3: Save and reboot Windows, then click Retry.
sandbox.biosKeys: Common BIOS keys: F2, Del, Esc, F10, F12 (varies by brand).

skills.hint: Skills are reusable instruction sets that guide Agent on specific tasks — like creating documents, presentations, or spreadsheets.
skills.removeBuiltinBody: This skill will be moved to Examples. You can always install it back later.
skills.removeCustomBody: This will permanently remove the skill. This action cannot be undone.
skills.allExamplesInstalled: All example skills are installed under Built-in.
skills.dropzoneText: Drop .zip or .skill file here, or click to browse
skills.dropzoneHint: SKILL.md required — name (lowercase, hyphens only) must match directory name

agents.hint: Define specialized subagents that the main agent can delegate tasks to.
agents.name: Name
agents.descriptionPlaceholder: What this agent does (shown to the main agent)
agents.toolsPlaceholder: e.g. Read, Grep, Glob (empty = all tools)
agents.deleteAgentBody: This will permanently remove the agent. This action cannot be undone.
